name: Anil Chakravarthy
background: Mr. Chakravarthy has served as President, Digital Experience Business since January 2020. Prior to joining Adobe, he was Chief Executive Officer of Informatica LLC from 2016 to 2020.

company_affiliations.name: Adobe Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Executive Vice President and General Manager, Digital Experience (later President, Customer Experience Orchestration)

company_affiliations.name: Symantec Corporation (now Gen Digital Inc.)
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Various leadership roles, including Executive Vice President of Information Security, Senior Vice President of Enterprise Security Group, and Senior Vice President of Storage and Availability Management Group
